calendar.matters:
Ntc On Hearing On Petition To Compel Compliance W/ Administrative Subpoenas
Off Calendar Mar-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Eliot Beckelman, Dept of Industrial Relations, 415.703.4877, appearing for the Petitioner;
Danning Jiang, Law Offices of Danning Jiang, 408.299.0800, appearing for the Respondent.

Argument held. At the conclussion of argument, PETITIONER JULIE SU'S Notice On Hearing On Petition To Compel Compliance with Administrative Subpoenas was taken under submission. Counsel are to prepare a proposed form of order and submit it to the Judge Pro Tem. Judge Pro-Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. =(302/JPT)

Order To Show Cause On Why The Administrative Subpoenas Issued By The Dlse Should Not Be Enforced
Off Calendar Mar-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Eliot Beckelman, Dept of Industrial Relations, 415.703.4877, appearing for the Petitioner;
Danning Jiang, Law Offices of Danning Jiang, 408.299.0800, appearing for the Respondent.

Argument held. At the conclussion of argument, Order To Show Cause On Why The Administrative Subpoenas Issued By The DLSE Should Not Be Enforced was taken under submission. Judge Pro-Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
